scenarios.question: Push 1M followers for celebrity post—naive fan-out problem?
scenarios.answer: **Write-time** fan-out **spikes** latency—**read-time** aggregation or **hybrid** with **precomputed** timelines—**Kafka** buffer **workers**.

scenarios.question: Email + SMS + push—unified model?
scenarios.answer: **Notification** entity with **channels**, **user preferences**, **template** rendering **per channel**—**idempotent** send with **external id**.

followUps.question: Exactly-once delivery to user?
followUps.answer: **Impossible** end-to-end—aim for **at-least-once** delivery plus **client-side dedup** and a **consistent unread counter**.

scenarios.question: Scheduling reminders at scale?
scenarios.answer: **Kafka delayed** topics (timer + compaction), **SQS delay**, **time-wheel** in scheduler service—**shard** by time bucket.
